scripts.lint: npm run config && npm run eslint
scripts.lint:fix: npm run config && npm run eslint:fix
scripts.mocha:run:parallel: find test/tests/specs/ -name 'spec*.js' | parallel -j2 mocha {} --timeout 2400000 --require test/main/baseTest --reporter allure-mocha --reporter-options resultsDir=./test/artifacts/allure-results --bail --retries 3
scripts.test: npm run config && npm run mocha:run
scripts.test:split: npm run config:split && npm run mocha:run:split
scripts.test:parallel: npm run config:parallel && npm run mocha:run:parallel
scripts.test:debug: node --inspect-brk -r ts-node/register node_modules/mocha/bin/_mocha -- test/tests/specs/*.js --timeout 20000 --require test/main/baseTest --reporter allure-mocha --bail
